page_metadata.biotools__summary: MISTIC (Mutual Information Server to Infer Coevolution) is a web server for graphical representation of the information contained in a multiple sequence alignment and a complete analysis tool for mutual information networks in proteins.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MISTIC (Mutual Information Server to Infer Coevolution) is a web server for graphical representation of the information contained in a multiple sequence alignment and a complete analysis tool for mutual information networks in proteins.
